metadata.description: Official marketplace for semantic-pages - Semantic search + knowledge graph MCP server with auto-wiring for .claude/.vault and hit-em-with-the-docs companion

plugins.name: semantic-pages
plugins.description: Semantic search + knowledge graph MCP server for markdown vaults. Auto-wires a read/write vault at .claude/.vault, and a read-only docs index at .documentation when hit-em-with-the-docs is also installed.
